name: Broker banking-detail change (BEC-style, high stakes)
subject: URGENT — updated remittance bank for all outstanding invoices (effective immediately)
trucking_context: Broker-impersonation BEC asking accounting to update wire instructions is the single highest-loss scam class hitting carrier finance teams; the README calls this out explicitly as the headline outbound-training scenario.
indicators: Sender domain landstarsystem-portal.net is a hyphen-insertion typosquat of landstarsystem.com
Any banking-instruction change must be verified by phone using a number from a prior known-good document, not from this email
Explicit redirect away from dispatch ('don't call the dispatch desk') is engineered to defeat out-of-band verification
Friday ACH-cutoff pressure is the standard BEC playbook
Asks for portal credentials before showing the new bank details — a real broker would attach a signed W-9 directly
